title: Attention, Calculated
tagline: From the Q/K/V projections to a tiny attention head trained live in your browser
summary: Twelve interactive steps from one-word ambiguity to manual backprop on a soft-lookup task — including the matrix-form attention, scaled dot products, causal masking, multi-head, sinusoidal positional encodings, and a permute-the-sentence demo.
highlights: See where Q, K, V come from — click a token, watch its 4-d embedding push through W_Q, W_K, W_V into 2-d query/key/value vectors.
Inspect the full N×N matrix-form attention live (score → softmax → weighted V) for any of six ambiguous sentences.
Three-knob playground: scaled dot product (slider over d_k with a softmax-sharpness histogram), causal masking, four parallel multi-head attention maps.
Sinusoidal positional encoding heatmap with sliders for T and d, plus a 'permute the sentence' demo showing why attention needs positions.
Watch a tiny attention head learn a soft-lookup task end-to-end in your browser — manual backprop in pure JS, loss curve and attention heatmap evolving live.
